blanket_rent_reduction.description: If private rents were X% lower, how would government housing benefit spending and tenant incomes change?

published_comparison.description: No published microsimulation estimates exist for blanket private rent reductions.

lha_unfreeze.description: Unfreezing Local Housing Allowance rates so they track market rents again.

published_comparison.description: Unfreezing LHA to 30th percentile of market rents.

sar_abolition.description: Lowering or abolishing the Shared Accommodation Rate age threshold.

published_comparison.description: Abolishing or lowering the Shared Accommodation Rate age threshold.

social_rent_cap.description: Tighter caps on council and housing association rents.

published_comparison.description: Tighter caps on council and housing association rents.

scotland_rent_cap.description: Scotland-style CPI+1% cap on private rents, modelled as an effective rent reduction.
